tools.name: zer0dte_snapshot
tools.description: Full 0DTE situational awareness in one call. Returns regime classification, key levels, expected move, volatility context, exposure totals, and flow summary.

tools.name: zer0dte_levels
tools.description: Key price levels from options positioning. Gamma flip point, call wall, put wall, max pain, highest OI strike, top 5 GEX strikes.

tools.name: zer0dte_exposure
tools.description: GEX/DEX/VEX/CHEX exposure by strike. Shows where dealer hedging activity is concentrated.

tools.name: zer0dte_chain
tools.description: Smart-filtered 0DTE options chain with Greeks. Returns only the relevant ATM slice.

tools.name: zer0dte_regime
tools.description: GEX regime classification. Positive or negative gamma, dealer behavior, historical context, confidence level.

tools.name: zer0dte_expected_move
tools.description: Expected price range from IV and ATM straddle price. Full-day and remaining move.

tools.name: zer0dte_flows
tools.description: Aggregated vanna and charm exposure with drift direction. Second-order Greeks that create systematic pressure.

tools.name: zer0dte_accuracy
tools.description: Historical accuracy of computed levels. How often gamma flip, call wall, put wall, and expected move held.

tools.name: zer0dte_history
tools.description: All regime snapshots for a specific date. How levels, regime, and price evolved throughout the session.

tools.name: zer0dte_compare
tools.description: Find past sessions most similar to today by regime, GEX magnitude, and IV level.

tools.name: zer0dte_calendar
tools.description: Economic calendar check. FOMC/CPI/NFP events, early close status, blackout windows.

tools.name: zer0dte_opening_range
tools.description: Opening range: first 60-minute high/low and breakout status.

tools.name: zer0dte_strikes
tools.description: Delta-targeted strike analysis for common 0DTE structures (iron condors, credit spreads).

tools.name: zer0dte_liquidity
tools.description: Liquidity assessment: bid-ask spread, volume, fill probability.

tools.name: zer0dte_pulse
tools.description: Lightweight monitoring. Price vs levels, regime status, risk level.

tools.name: zer0dte_alert
tools.description: Monitors regime flips, level breaks, VIX spikes, proximity to key levels. Severity-graded alerts.

tools.name: zer0dte_entry_score
tools.description: Research-backed entry scoring (0-100). Evaluates multiple market factors to answer: should you enter a 0DTE trade right now?

tools.name: zer0dte_regime_history
tools.description: Regime transition history: what happened the last N times the regime flipped? Returns transitions with from/to regime, duration, GEX, price, and trigger.

lookback_days.description: How many days back to search

tools.name: zer0dte_pattern
tools.description: Pattern matching: find historical instances matching the current setup. Given regime and/or proximity to a key level, returns what happened next.

regime.description: Filter by regime. Auto-detects if omitted.

near_level.description: Filter by proximity to level type

lookback_days.description: How many days back to search

tools.name: zer0dte_overnight
tools.description: Pre-market context: overnight futures (ES, NQ, RTY), VIX/VIX1D/VVIX, gap analysis, risk sentiment.

tools.name: zer0dte_session_log
tools.description: Today's reasoning log: regime flips, wall breaks, entry scores, confidence transitions for the active or specified date.
